summary: Focana 1.6.0 makes startup and quitting more intentional, with launch at login, clearer resume behavior, and safer ways to keep the app resident instead of accidentally closing it.
improvements: Added Launch at login in Settings so Focana can open automatically when you sign in.
Startup now uses a clearer set of surfaces: clean starts open the normal idle window, while interrupted or resumable work comes back in clearer resume states.
Quit confirmation now offers Cancel, Minimize, Hide, and Quit so it is easier to keep Focana resident instead of accidentally shutting it down.
fixes: Restoring from floating minimize now more reliably returns to the correct window state instead of surfacing stale hidden-window state.
Sleep, relaunch, and update restart flows now preserve interrupted work more consistently across startup and resume.
Release tooling now finds shared .env.release files from the main checkout when you run ship flows from a fresh worktree.
